title: lathyrus laevigatus subsp. hispanicus
intro: Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. hispanicus, also known as Spanish vetchling, is a plant species within the genus Lathyrus. It is a perennial legume that has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. hispanicus can be prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
